Because once you eliminate the source, you don't need to do the job anymore. And so that's what we really do here in WK. We look at version one, we examine it, and then we make it better.

## [45:55 - 48:57]

And we polish it up and we turn it into a way better program. And the cool thing you can do here is, since you've built a new version, I show you how to build the new version, once you've got that, you can let all the people you've got from here upgrade to the new version for free if they submit a testimonial video, which is an awesome hack to use. It's one of the most powerful hacks out there. Because if you've got 50 people in version one and then you've got version two, you're going to get like 40 testimonials. So you'll have 40 testimonial videos that you can put on your website, you can use in your webinar, you can use on Facebook and all of that. So this is a powerful strategy. So now at WK, you've got the ultimate course, which is created in a collaborative way with your clients in a live environment, so this thing is going to be killer. And more than that, you've also got 20 to 40 testimonial videos endorsing this. And more than that, you've got three proven funnels and you know exactly how to do Facebook. You've got an eight figure mindset and you've already made three to 500 grand. So you're really on fire at this point. You've got the mindset, you've got the customers, you've got the money flowing in, you've got the marketing system in the engine to take those people, turn them into customers. And you've also got a sound understanding of how to generate that traffic on Facebook. And then the final week, week nine, is all about hiring and managing FB and sales reps. Now remember I told you here that to get to eight figures, you've got to think differently. It's about working smarter, not harder. So in Accelerator, we show you how to do everything yourself. That's the best way to start. It's how I started, that's how everyone starts. Now here in week nine, we show you actually how to hire other people to do the work for you. So you don't want to be doing your own Facebook ads every day. So I show you how to hire, train and manage a Facebook person to do your ads for you. And I show you how to get them at a cheap rate. Because you want to be able to get someone at a low cost, you don't want to have to pay someone a fortune. And I show you how to really home grow them. So how to find someone that has promising potential and already knows the basics. And then you can give them this process and this training. They can learn from that training and then they can become a real weapon that you've got on your team. And then that's off your plate. You don't need to do Facebook anymore. And then sales reps. So instead of you doing the strategy sessions and everything, show you how to hire, train and manage reps. People that work on commission and people that will work for you and you only really have to pay them

## [48:57 - 51:59]

when they get you a customer. So that way you don't have all of these employees that you've got to pay and everything. We keep these guys as contractors and we really only have to pay the sales reps when they get us clients. And when you can get to this level, you're going to be going like a machine. Like without this, you can easily get to seven figures. You know, I was able to get to 350 grand a month by myself doing my own ads, doing my own strategy sessions. Without any staff. And then when you get these people on your team, like one Facebook rep and then say two sales reps, that's how you can scale up. That's how you can get up into the eight figures. Andrew Argyu was able to get to about 300 grand a month on his own. And now he's making a million dollars a month. He has eight sales reps all on commission and they're all virtual. He doesn't have an office. These are eight sales reps that work from home. And he has one Facebook ads manager. So he doesn't do his own ads. He doesn't do his own sales calls. And that's how he's able to produce a million a month with one training program. And that's what Uplevel taught him how to do. You know, Andrew is really a perfect example of the power that Uplevel has. He entered this doing Done For You and 101 and struggling. And he came out of it with a million dollar a month business. So that's really what this helps you to do. So a quick recap. Week one, we map out your course. We don't create it. We just get the high level view. What's in it? Then in week two, we sell it before you build it. We get the money first to validate that this is going to work before we make a single piece of content. Here, we build version one. One week at a time, live in a collaborative way as we step the clients through. So the key thing is here, guys, we're getting the money first before we're building the damn course. It makes me shiver when I see people build a course before selling it. Wrong way to do it. And then six rapid promo strategies, three proven funnels and templates. And I give you, this is the first time I've ever shared this. You get the VSL funnel specifically for selling online courses and online coaching. You get the JIT automated webinar funnel. And you also get my accelerator 2K funnel. And this thing is a beast. And I've had people come in and work on this. Like I found the best guy in the world really at Infusionsoft. His name's Jermaine Griggs and he went over this thing and he fact checked every piece in it. Because a lot of times when people build a funnel, they mess it up and all the automation gets tangled up and it doesn't work properly. And the funniest thing is that no one even is aware of it. Your campaign can be screwing up without you even knowing. And don't think that, oh, that only happens to people who don't know what they're doing.

## [51:59 - 55:00]

It happens to everybody. I've even hired people from Infusionsoft and paid them like 15 grand and they still messed it up. And then I tracked down this guy, Jermaine, who's the best in the world. And I paid him about 36 grand to go through and just absolutely fact check this thing. So I've invested millions into making this thing what it is. Actually millions because I've spent more than 6 million on Facebook ads. It's made me more than 25 million to hone it and refine it and get it to this point of perfection. And I'm just porting it into your account. And then Facebook ads unleashed. This is all about how to generate online course clients and group coaching clients. Instead of an accelerator, we're getting one on one and done for you. Week seven, all about eight figure mindset. How do you develop a real hunger and a fire within you so that you're never satisfied and you want to keep pushing? Also, how do you outsource the mundane things which you shouldn't be doing? When you get started in business and you get into up level, the mindset and the hunger of everyone else in there is contagious. And it's going to catch on to you like a virus. And when it does that, you're not going to look at things the same way. When it comes to cleaning your house, you're not going to do it. You're going to get someone else to do it. When it comes to all of these tasks like cooking and things, you're not going to do it. Because you want to save all of your energy and all of your time for the high impact things. And then at building the ultimate course, I show you how to make the ultimate, the most perfect course. A course that you can push people through. They don't need any hand holding and they just go through it and they get the result without much support at all. Without you doing one on one's or any of that, the ultimate course. And if there's one thing I know how to do, it's this thing. And then hiring and managing Facebook person to do your ads and sales reps. When you get to this point here, you know, your business is like a well oiled machine. It's a beautiful thing. You've got you, your Facebook person, two sales reps. And the Facebook person is running ads, generating leads for the salespeople. The salespeople are getting those leads, doing the calls and selling people. And then those people are getting put into your online course and they're going through that themselves. And all you have to do is show up to two Q&A calls a week, do those, which is fun because you just answer questions and you just go into the Facebook group and communicate with people. Like imagine how much different your life would be like if instead of doing all the work, being on the tools and doing done for you, or instead of being in the trenches doing one on one, imagine if all you had to do was two Q&A calls a week at set times and just communicate in the Facebook group. And the whole process just works like a machine and it just starts making money. So that is what we do.

## [55:00 - 58:00]

Now let's talk about how you can actually get started with up level consulting. Because unlike a consulting accelerator, this is a totally different thing.
